twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
twoFactor.setupDescription: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator or Authy to set up 2FA.

socialAccounts.title: Linked Accounts
socialAccounts.googleMismatch: The Google account email must match your current account email.
socialAccounts.googleAlreadyLinked: This Google account is already linked elsewhere.
socialAccounts.facebookComingSoon: Will be supported in a later release

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.warning: When you delete your account, all personal data, order history, and accumulated points will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

unlinkGoogleModal.title: Verify to unlink Google
unlinkGoogleModal.description: For security, please enter your current password before unlinking Google.

toasts.socialLoadFailed: Unable to load linked account status.
toasts.passwordTooShort: The new password must be at least 6 characters.
toasts.passwordUpdateFailed: Failed to change password. Please check your current password.
toasts.unlinkPasswordRequired: Please enter your password to verify.
toasts.unlinkLastLoginMethod: You cannot unlink the last remaining sign-in method.
